description: LAN collaboration and sharing tools for STM32 projects
command.openPanel.title: Open STM32 Collaboration Panel
command.startSession.title: Start STM32 Collaboration Session
command.joinSession.title: Join STM32 Collaboration Session
command.discoverSessions.title: Discover STM32 Collaboration Sessions
command.startRealtimeSync.title: Start STM32 Realtime Sync
command.stopRealtimeSync.title: Stop STM32 Realtime Sync
command.startLanShare.title: Start STM32 LAN Share
command.stopLanShare.title: Stop STM32 LAN Share
command.startGitDaemon.title: Start STM32 Git Daemon
command.stopGitDaemon.title: Stop STM32 Git Daemon
command.shareDebugSnapshot.title: Share STM32 Debug Snapshot (Read-only)
command.runQualityAudit.title: Run STM32 Quality Audit
command.exportProjectZip.title: Export STM32 Project as ZIP
command.startWsSync.title: Start STM32 Workspace Sync
command.stopWsSync.title: Stop STM32 Workspace Sync
configuration.title: STM32 Collaboration
configuration.sharePort.description: Port used by the STM32 LAN share server.
configuration.discoveryPort.description: UDP multicast port used for session discovery.
configuration.syncPort.description: UDP multicast port used for realtime collaboration sync.
configuration.gitPort.description: Port used by the local Git daemon for LAN sharing.
configuration.wsSyncPort.description: Port used by STM32 workspace synchronization.
